notes: Fixes mlxstudio#88 — Gemma 4 VLM image requests crashed with `TypeError: concatenate(): incompatible function arguments` on multi-image prompts. Upstream mlx_vlm.models.gemma4.vision.VisionModel.__call__ handled `isinstance(list)` but didn't coerce per-item, and MLX 0.31+ rejects non-mx.array items. The Gemma 4 processor pipeline can hand us a list mixing mx.array + np.ndarray on multi-image requests, so we now per-item coerce before concat. Applied idempotently in bundle-python.sh + verify gated.
